provider.description: OpenCode provider id, for example anthropic or openai.

model.description: OpenCode model id in provider/model format.

api_key.description: Provider API key to write into the OpenCode config.

small_model.description: Optional small model id for lightweight OpenCode tasks.

share.description: OpenCode sharing mode: manual, auto, or disabled.

permission.description: Default OpenCode permission mode: ask, allow, or deny.

version.description: Optional OpenCode version to install, for example 1.0.180. Defaults to latest.

config.description: Optional JSON object merged over the generated OpenCode config.
